race.description: The Prince Of Merewether Country Boosted Handicap
race.comment: ZOUTEMPUS (3) deep into the preparation and has gone to a new level at his last two outings. Taken to the front and never headed with the 60kg for a dominant victory over 1100m at Goulburn. Tricky draw again and expected to prove hard to catch. MISS CAPRICORN (6) has been consistent since a fresh win and was an eye-catcher when running on strongly last start. Could take closer order from a lower draw. THEDAYTHEMUSICDIED (8) comes back in distance and will relish the fast tempo. Assess on the good Taree win three-back. Improver. TOOMUCHINFORMATION (11) will be fitter for two starts off a spell so could show more.
